scripts.coverage: npm run typecheck && bun test suites/shared/assertions/index.test.ts --coverage
scripts.format: npx @biomejs/biome format --write biome.json package.json tsconfig.json suites
scripts.lint: npx @biomejs/biome lint biome.json package.json tsconfig.json suites
scripts.test: npm run typecheck && bun test suites/shared/assertions/index.test.ts
